rules.message: Project scan found no asset files.
rules.recommendation: Add or restore the approved project asset structure before continuing.

rules.message: Project scan found no code modules.
rules.recommendation: Define at least one approved code module before implementation validation.

rules.message: Project scan found no scene files.
rules.recommendation: Restore or define an approved scene before scene-dependent work.

rules.message: Project structure has no resources directory.
rules.recommendation: Confirm whether the project intentionally omits a resources directory.

rules.message: Project scripts contain unresolved TODO markers.
rules.recommendation: Review TODO markers and convert approved work into tracked tasks.

rules.message: Project Intelligence reports a blocked project state.
rules.recommendation: Resolve blocking issues before recommending further production work.

rules.message: Project Intelligence reports an at-risk project state.
rules.recommendation: Review open project risks before advancing the project phase.
Complete or explicitly defer remaining tasks before final validation.

rules.message: Execution feedback contains failed validation samples.
rules.recommendation: Review failed feedback samples before relying on historical performance.
